hyperedges.label: Phase 2 to Phase 3 Testing Progression
hyperedges.rationale: The three documents describe a sequential project plan: Phase 2 establishes core testing (5 categories), Phase 3 Preparation plans the advanced testing, Phase 3 Completion delivers the remaining 5 categories achieving 100% coverage, and both Phase 3 docs reference Phase 4 as the next step.

hyperedges.label: Memory Stack Database Testing Ecosystem
hyperedges.rationale: The memory stack (PostgreSQL+pgVector, Qdrant, Neo4j, Redis) is tested as an integrated unit in Phase 2 integration tests, and all its Python client libraries are listed together in requirements.txt.

hyperedges.label: Compliance and Security Risk Management Chain
hyperedges.rationale: Security and compliance testing spans Phase 2 (OWASP Top 10, initial compliance frameworks) through Phase 3 (enhanced compliance testing with GDPR/SOC2/PCI DSS/ISO 27001, compliance-as-code pattern), with the risk of missing compliance scope explicitly identified in preparation.

hyperedges.label: Phase 2 to Phase 3 Testing Progression
hyperedges.rationale: The three documents describe a sequential project plan: Phase 2 establishes core testing (5 categories), Phase 3 Preparation plans the advanced testing, Phase 3 Completion delivers the remaining 5 categories achieving 100% coverage, and both Phase 3 docs reference Phase 4 as the next step.

hyperedges.label: Memory Stack Database Testing Ecosystem
hyperedges.rationale: The memory stack (PostgreSQL+pgVector, Qdrant, Neo4j, Redis) is tested as an integrated unit in Phase 2 integration tests, and all its Python client libraries are listed together in requirements.txt.

hyperedges.label: Compliance and Security Risk Management Chain
hyperedges.rationale: Security and compliance testing spans Phase 2 (OWASP Top 10, initial compliance frameworks) through Phase 3 (enhanced compliance testing with GDPR/SOC2/PCI DSS/ISO 27001, compliance-as-code pattern), with the risk of missing compliance scope explicitly identified in preparation.
